meeting.title: Q2 Budget Review

segments.text: Good morning everyone. Today we're reviewing the Q2 budget.
I've prepared the numbers. We're currently at 85% of our Q2 target.
That's good news. What are the main cost drivers?
Engineering headcount is the biggest item. Marketing is under budget.
Great. Bob, can you prepare the full budget draft by Friday?
Carol, can you share it with stakeholders by end of next week?

meeting.notes:
Q2 Budget Review Meeting

- Team is at 85% of Q2 target
- Engineering headcount is primary cost driver
- Marketing spend is under budget
- Bob to prepare full budget draft
- Carol to distribute to stakeholders
meeting.summary: The team reviewed Q2 financial performance (85% of target). Key cost driver is engineering headcount. Bob will prepare the full budget draft by Friday; Carol will distribute to stakeholders by end of next week.
